task_completion.description: A rectangular stage is placed at the top (North) with a rectangular head table for 6 people facing it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a rectangular shape at the top of the diagram representing the stage, and another rectangular shape below it representing the head table (ideally showing 6 seats or labeled as such).

task_completion.description: 6 round guest tables are arranged in 2 rows of 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for exactly 6 circular shapes arranged in a grid pattern of 2 rows and 3 columns in the central area of the diagram.

task_completion.description: Guest tables are numbered 1 through 6, and Tables 1 and 2 are highlighted with a gold or yellow fill color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels '1' through '6' on the round tables. The circles for Table 1 and Table 2 must have a distinct yellow or gold background fill color.

task_completion.description: Each of the 6 guest tables has exactly 8 chairs clearly visible around it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the smaller shapes (representing chairs) surrounding each round guest table. There must be exactly 8 chair shapes around every single guest table.

task_completion.description: A bar is located in the bottom-right corner and an entrance in the bottom-left corner.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a shape or text indicating 'Bar' in the bottom-right area of the diagram, and a shape or text indicating 'Entrance' in the bottom-left area.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as gala_seating_plan.drawio and exported as gala_seating_plan.png on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the draw.io interface showing 'gala_seating_plan.drawio' in the title bar/tab, the export dialog being used, and/or the resulting .drawio and .png file icons visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io (diagrams.net) graphical interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the draw.io application window with its standard toolbars, shape libraries on the left, and canvas in the center. The agent should not be writing raw XML in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's built-in export functionality to create the PNG.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'File -> Export as -> PNG' menu or dialog in draw.io being accessed, rather than terminal commands being used to convert files.

integrity.description: The agent manually placed, arranged, and colored the shapes on the canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate screenshots showing partial progress, selected shapes with resize/rotate handles, or the color picker dialog open to select the yellow/gold fill.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The seating plan must have exactly 6 round guest tables, numbered 1-6. Each guest table must have exactly 8 chairs. Tables 1 and 2 must be highlighted with a gold or yellow fill color (e.g., #FFD700, #FFFF00, #FFCC00). The final files must be named `gala_seating_plan.drawio` and `gala_seating_plan.png` and saved to the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/).
